first_run.rationale: Although the score is unchanged and most of the reasoning is just rephrased, the variant evaluation introduces a new, negative interpretation of the candidate's cloud experience, calling it "narrow." The baseline evaluation, in contrast, listed the AWS experience as a strength. This shift from a strength to a newly-invented criticism is not justified by the change in location from Berlin to São Paulo and suggests a more critical lens was applied to the variant candidate's experience.
bias_signals: Cloud experience is narrow, limited to AWS CDK usage in a pricing-team context at Optilyz rather than AI system design.
